commandDescription.zh-CN: 交互式管理模型发现 provider（添加/删除/重新发现），写入 models.json 并立即生效
commandDescription.en-US: Interactively manage model-discovery providers (add/remove/rediscover); changes are written to models.json and take effect immediately

refreshDescription.zh-CN: 强制重新拉取所有模型发现 provider 的模型列表并更新本地缓存（启动时默认走缓存，不请求网络）
refreshDescription.en-US: Force rediscovery of all model-discovery providers and update the local cache (startup uses the cache and performs no network requests by default)

refreshEmpty.zh-CN: models.json 中没有标记 discoverModels 的 provider，可用 /model-discovery 添加
refreshEmpty.en-US: No provider in models.json is marked with discoverModels; add one with /model-discovery

refreshDone.zh-CN: 模型刷新完成：{ok}/{total} 个 provider 成功

commandValueUnsupported.zh-CN: 发现请求不支持 "!command" 形式的配置值
commandValueUnsupported.en-US: Discovery requests do not support "!command" configuration values

headerSkipped.zh-CN: {id}: header "{key}" {reason}，该 header 未随发现请求发送
headerSkipped.en-US: {id}: header "{key}" {reason}; this header was not sent with the discovery request

missingConfig.zh-CN: 缺少 {field}，无法注册模型发现

discoveryFailed.zh-CN: {id}: 模型发现失败（{reason}），该 provider 暂用 models.json 手写 models 或无可用模型
discoveryFailed.en-US: {id}: model discovery failed ({reason}); falling back to handwritten models in models.json, or no models available

offlineNoCache.zh-CN: 尚无已发现的模型（上次发现失败），离线初始化跳过
offlineNoCache.en-US: No discovered models yet (last discovery failed); skipping offline initialization

cacheReadFailed.zh-CN: 模型缓存读取失败（已忽略，将重新发现）：{reason}
cacheReadFailed.en-US: Failed to read the model cache (ignored; will rediscover): {reason}

cacheWriteFailed.en-US: Failed to write the model cache: {reason}

title.zh-CN: 模型发现 provider（共 {count} 个）

providerId.zh-CN: provider id（小写字母/数字/中划线，如 my-proxy）
providerId.en-US: Provider id (letters, numbers, hyphens; e.g. my-proxy)

invalidId.zh-CN: id 只能包含字母、数字、中划线，且不能以中划线开头
invalidId.en-US: The id may contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens, and cannot start with a hyphen

invalidUrl.zh-CN: baseUrl 必须以 http:// 或 https:// 开头
invalidUrl.en-US: baseUrl must start with http:// or https://

confirmAdd.en-US: Add this provider and write it to models.json?

discovered.zh-CN: {id}: 已发现并注册 {count} 个模型，/model 中即可选用
discovered.en-US: {id}: discovered and registered {count} models; they are available in /model

firstFailed.zh-CN: {id}: 配置已保存，但首次发现失败；服务恢复后可在 /model-discovery 中重新发现
firstFailed.en-US: {id}: configuration saved, but initial discovery failed; rediscover with /model-discovery after the service recovers

removeMessage.zh-CN: 将从 models.json 移除该 provider 并注销其模型。此操作可重新添加恢复。
removeMessage.en-US: This removes the provider and unregisters its models from models.json. It can be added again later.
